purpose: Static companion skill index for public agent discovery. This file describes read-only, draft-only, external-write, and financial agent-surface manifest commands backed by local endpoint code and tests.

skills.title: Read public site overview
skills.description: Read public page regions for AIssisted Consulting positioning, audience paths, services, booking-route information, privacy boundaries, and contact details.

skills.title: Read public business profile
skills.description: Read public business identity, contact, location, audience, service-area, booking-policy, and boundary facts from the static business profile feed.

skills.title: Read public services
skills.description: Read public service categories, workflow focus, fit boundaries, and recommended next actions from the static services feed.

skills.title: Read public service areas
skills.description: Read Ocala, Central Florida, North Central Florida, and remote-support facts from the static service areas feed.

skills.title: Draft business workflow question
skills.description: Prepare a small-business workflow question draft for human review using the public contact page fields. This skill does not submit the draft.

skills.title: Draft family AI question
skills.description: Prepare a family AI setup, privacy, or safety question draft for human review using the public contact page fields. This skill does not submit the draft.

skills.title: Read booking availability
skills.description: Read public booking availability, reservation amount, currency, policy version, and policy text without creating a booking hold.

skills.title: Read booking status
skills.description: Read status for a booking id and Stripe Checkout session id supplied by the user or success URL.

skills.title: Submit contact inquiry
skills.description: Submit a user-approved contact inquiry with consent, Idempotency-Key, duplicate suppression, and audit logging.

skills.title: Create booking checkout
skills.description: Create a user-approved booking hold and Stripe Checkout Session with exact amount and policy confirmation, Idempotency-Key, and audit logging.

boundaries: External-write and financial commands require human approval.
Contact submission requires consent, Idempotency-Key, duplicate suppression, and audit logging.
Booking checkout requires policy acceptance, checkout consent, exact amount/currency/policy confirmation, Idempotency-Key, slot conflict checks, and Stripe Checkout.
The website does not collect card details; payment happens on Stripe Checkout.
No auth, CRM/email, analytics, browser storage, or direct card-collection command is exposed.
Live publication and production credential setup remain outside this local file until explicitly approved.
